---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. `slack-cli ...`
2. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. If possible, include the (redacted) error output.

## Environment

- `slack-cli` version: (run `slack-cli --version`)
- Node.js version: (run `node --version`)
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows
- Install method: `npm i -g @mimo-3/slack-cli` / from source / other

## Additional context

Anything else that might help us diagnose the issue. Please **do not** paste your Slack token or
the contents of `~/.slack-cli/`.
